creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

In a private conversation between I and nectar@, he thought that he did 
not saw the same problem for some years, nor anyone reported the same 
issue.  The issue is not "completely proven" to be solved, however, 
we both think it's OK to close this PR, as there is nobody else claims 
the same issue, and CVS itself has upgraded several times.
